evals.prompt: Write an Airflow DAG that extracts daily sales data from a Postgres database, transforms it using a Pandas script to calculate daily totals, and loads it into BigQuery.
evals.expected_output: Python Airflow DAG script implementing an ETL pipeline.
expectations: Defines a valid Airflow DAG with schedule_interval and default_args
Includes an Extract task (e.g., PostgresOperator or PythonOperator with psycopg2)
Includes a Transform task using Pandas
Includes a Load task (e.g., GCSToBigQueryOperator or bigquery client)
Sets correct task dependencies (extract >> transform >> load)

evals.prompt: Design an ETL pipeline architecture for streaming IoT sensor data into a data lake for analytics. Needs to handle 10,000 events per second.
evals.expected_output: High-level architecture design for streaming ETL.
expectations: Recommends a streaming ingestion tool (e.g., Kafka, Kinesis, Pub/Sub)
Recommends a stream processing engine (e.g., Spark Streaming, Flink, Dataflow)
Recommends a data lake storage destination (e.g., S3, GCS)
Addresses scalability and error handling (dead letter queues)
